type_definitions.name: TraitImplDecl
type_definitions.description: Single trait implementation declaration within a SecondaryAdapter entry (trait_name + optional expected_methods at L1 resolution)

type_definitions.name: TraitImplEntry
type_definitions.description: Single trait implementation on a type in TypeGraph (trait_name + methods, populated by build_type_graph from rustdoc JSON impl blocks)

type_definitions.name: TypeDefinitionKind
type_definitions.description: Classifies a type-catalogue entry by its structural role in the codebase (12 to 13 variants, adding SecondaryAdapter for infrastructure port impls)

type_definitions.name: TypeGraph
type_definitions.description: Pre-indexed query interface for type catalogue evaluation (T003: added get_impl accessor for trait impl lookup)

type_definitions.name: TypeNode
type_definitions.description: Public type in crate as indexed for TDDD evaluation (T003: added trait_impls field + set_trait_impls setter)
